title: shim dev->ctx.cmdBuf access is a fragile private-API dependency without a version pin
description: wolftpm_rs_shim.c directly accesses dev->ctx.cmdBuf, which is a wolfTPM internal field not part of the public API. The build.rs emits a cargo:warning pinning the tested version (4.0.0 / fbbf6fe) but there is no hard version constraint in wolftpm-src's Cargo.toml that would prevent building against a newer wolfTPM that reorganizes TPM2_CTX. The _Static_assert on struct sizes would catch layout regressions that shrink cmdBuf but would pass silently if wolfTPM adds fields before cmdBuf (shifting its offset). Users who upgrade wolfTPM will get a silent miscompile, not a compile error, unless they also hit the size assertion. A version range check in build.rs or a comment explaining exactly which field offset is assumed would reduce maintenance cost.
